/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -O3 -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib -current_version 0.12.0 -o libggml-base.0.12.0.dylib -install_name @rpath/libggml-base.0.dylib "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml-alloc.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml-backend.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml-backend-meta.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml-opt.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml-threading.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml-quants.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/gguf.cpp.o"  -lm
